data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Secures communications between user and server to prevent data interception.
data.technical_spec: Use of TLS 1.3 protocol with AES-256 encryption.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Adds layers of security by requiring multiple forms of verification.
data.technical_spec: Integrates with Microsoft Authenticator for two-step verification.

data.title: Web Application Firewall
data.description: Protects against common web vulnerabilities like SQL injection and cross-site scripting.
data.technical_spec: WAF policies are enforced through Azure Application Gateway.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular code reviews and vulnerability assessments.
data.technical_spec: Pentesting and automated vulnerability scanning utilizing Azure Security Center.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Provides resilience against distributed denial-of-service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Implemented via Azure DDoS Protection Standard.
